sizing_rule.note: Allocate optimal_f_per_system = optimal_f_total / number_of_negatively_correlated_systems. Apply when multiple market systems exist with negative correlation; losses in one system offset by gains in another on same day.

source_rule_text: In a diversified portfolio with negatively correlated market systems, allocate a smaller optimal f factor in dollars to each individual system than would be used trading that system alone, offsetting losses in one system with gains in another.
